texto: The Eggciting Easter Brunch at Seasons promises you and your family a celebration filled with eggcitement and a sumptuous spread. The little ones will be enthralled with egg hunt and egg decoration activities while the adults can relax with live entertainment and delicious food.Available on April 14 and 15, from 1.00 to 4.00 pmAED 245* per person with soft drinksAED 389* per person with house beverages
